chapter_title.ar: باب الْقِرَاءَةِ يَوْمَ الْجُمُعَةِ وَ لَيْلَتَهَا فِي الصَّلَوَاتِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 71 – The recitation on the day of Friday and its night in the Salāt

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/361)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/361)
text: لَيْسَ فِي الْقِرَاءَةِ شَيْ‏ءٌ مُوَقَّتٌ إِلَّا الْجُمُعَةِ تُقْرَأُ بِالْجُمُعَةِ وَ الْمُنَافِقِينَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Mansour Bin Hazim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘There is nothing fixed regarding the recitation except for the Friday. You should recite with the (Surah) Al-Jummah (Chapter 62), and the (Surah) Al-Munafiqeen (Chapter 63)’.
en.sarwar: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn from Safwan ibn Yahya from Mansur ibn Hazim who has said the following: “Abu ’Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The recitation is not definite texts except on Friday in which there is Surah (chapter) al-Jumu‘ah and al-Munafiqun.’”
